name: GitHub Actions API
what_it_does: GitHub's CI/CD automation platform with a REST API for triggering, monitoring, and managing workflow runs, artifacts, secrets, and runners programmatically from agents.
use_cases: Triggering workflow runs programmatically from agent decisions
Monitoring build and deployment status from CI agents
Managing repository secrets and environment variables via API
Downloading build artifacts from completed workflow runs
Listing and canceling workflow runs for pipeline management
not_for: Non-GitHub repositories (use CircleCI, GitLab CI, or Jenkins)
Complex enterprise pipeline orchestration without GitHub
best_when: Your codebase is on GitHub and you need to trigger/monitor CI/CD workflows from agent automation.
avoid_when: Your code is hosted on GitLab, Bitbucket, or other platforms.

auth.notes: Personal Access Tokens (classic or fine-grained) for automation. GitHub Apps use JWT + installation tokens for production agents. Fine-grained PATs allow minimal permissions.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 2,000 minutes/month on public repos, 500MB storage
pricing.paid_tiers: GitHub Team $4/user/month includes 3k minutes, Enterprise from $21/user/month
pricing.notes: Public repos get unlimited free minutes. Private repos use minutes from plan. API access is included with any plan.

performance.rate_limits: 5,000 requests/hour for authenticated requests; 15,000 for GitHub Apps

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Comprehensive error responses with message and documentation_url fields. GitHub API docs are excellent.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Workflow dispatch events are not idempotent - each trigger creates a new run. Secret creation/update is idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: workflow_dispatch triggers are fire-and-forget - must poll for run status using separate API calls
Rate limits of 5k/hour shared across all API calls - agents making frequent status checks hit limits
Fine-grained PATs may not support all API operations yet (still expanding coverage)
Artifact download URLs expire quickly - must fetch fresh URL before downloading
GITHUB_TOKEN in workflow has limited permissions - may need additional PAT for cross-repo operations
